package.name: car_sensor_bridge
package.description:
On-vehicle sensor input adapter for the DV pipeline.
Provides the two EKF inputs a plain topic remap cannot: * /steering_angle (rad) converted from the uDV /steering/angle_sensor (deg). * /motor_rpm republished from the inverter feed (the uDV exposes no wheel-speed topic). Inverter source is provisional and fully parameterised — see docs/CAR_ADAPTATION.md.
Pure conversion math lives in conversions.py and is unit-tested with no ROS dependency.
